steps.title: Interpret increasing by 1,600%
steps.content: When we increase a quantity by 1,600%, we add 1,600% of the original to itself. Convert the percentage: 1,600% = $\frac{1,600}{100} = 16$. So the result is the original plus 16 times the original: $$x + 16x = 17x$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: We know the final result is 544, so: $$17x = 544$$ Divide both sides by 17: $$x = \frac{544}{17} = 32$$ That confirms D is correct.
